calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: MECH-090 R-c commit-readiness gate validation (commitment_closure:GAP-4 substrate, requeue of 592b after silent-drop)
items.note: Re-run of V3-EXQ-592b after the 2026-05-29T08:32:39Z silent-drop on DLAPTOP-4.local. V3-EXQ-592b's runner_status entry records FAIL + 4162s + "[experiment_protocol] sentinel written:" log line, but the sentinel (REE_assembly/evidence/experiments/_runner_signals/V3-EXQ-592b.json), the manifest (v3_exq_592b_mech090_commit_readiness_gate_validation/...20260529T083239Z_v3.json), the coordinator results table row, the coordinator spool entry, and the REE_assembly origin/master git history all show no trace. Coordinator experiments row is marked completed (updated_at 2026-05-29T08:32:43Z) because report_queue_remove fired, but report_result was never called. Root cause identified in ree-v3/experiment_runner.py FAIL branch (lines 2267-2305) and ERROR branch (2229-2265): unlike the PASS branch at 2326-2410, neither early-return branch calls _result_manifest_exists, git_push_results, or coordinator_client.report_result. Only report_queue_remove fires. FAIL/ERROR-class manifestation of the line-1394 UNKNOWN silent-drop bug that was only retrofitted to the success branch on 2026-05-08. Runner-code fix is a separate /implement-substrate concern. This re-run uses machine_affinity=ree-cloud-3 rather than "any" to (a) deliver the MECH-090 R-c validation on a different transport path and (b) help distinguish whether 592b's manifest was never written (script-side write failure invisible downstream) vs lost to a DLAPTOP-4 filesystem cause -- a cloud-3 PASS persists the manifest end-to-end via the runner success path; a cloud-3 FAIL hits the same silent-drop runner bug but the per-machine difference rules out a Mac-only cause and routes to /failure-autopsy. Substrate-validation logic identical to 592b: ARM_0 GATED (use_commit_readiness_gate=True, floor=0.05, EMERGENT-arm curriculum); ARM_1 GATED_FORCED_READY (cloned trained agent + rv forced to 0.001). PASS = (ARM_0 falsifier on >= 1 seed in 3) AND (ARM_1 admit on >= 2 seeds in 3). Smoke verified 2026-05-29 dry-run --seeds 42: wiring intact, gate ON propagates, diagnostics populated, ARM_0 margin=0.7977 ARM_1 margin=0.1285 (matched to 592b smoke). Predecessor synthesis: REE_assembly/evidence/literature/targeted_review_connectome_mech_090/synthesis.md commit 9e68c5ca8a. Predecessor session: implement-substrate-mech090-commit-predicate-20260528T172800Z.

items.title: INV-074 crystallization necessity test (re-queue of V3-EXQ-610 with corrected runtime estimate)
items.note: Re-queue of V3-EXQ-610 (ran 2026-05-27T18:05:04Z on DLAPTOP-4.local, runner-classified ERROR via exit code -15 SIGTERM after actual_secs=47729.4 / 13.25h vs 180min estimate; no on-disk manifest, no code crash). Predecessor ran ARM_0_control to completion across all 3 seeds (verified ep 2500/2500 phase=3 log lines), then started ARM_1_test seed=42 and reached ep 2100/2500 phase=3 before SIGTERM. Script byte-identical to predecessor except EXPERIMENT_TYPE/QUEUE_ID/SUPERSEDES updated and stdout tags refreshed to [V3-EXQ-610a]; manifest now carries supersedes='V3-EXQ-610' so governance can mark the predecessor manifest superseded (no predecessor manifest exists; supersession is for queue-side traceability). estimated_minutes=800 (~13.5h) calibrated to predecessor actual_secs. Per IGW-20260529-030. Smoke 2026-05-29T06:25Z PASS (5 eps/arm/seed, ARM_0 + ARM_1 wiring intact, verdict line emitted). Substrate dependency MECH-341 landed 2026-05-27 commit 547faa3.
